sentences.arabic: أَسْهَمَ الْمُثَقَّفُونَ الْعَرَبُ فِي الْقَرْنِ الْعِشْرِينَ فِي إِرْسَاءِ أُسُسِ النَّهْضَةِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ الْحَدِيثَةِ مِنْ خِلَالِ الصَّحَافَةِ وَالرِّوَايَةِ وَالْمَسْرَحِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski intelektualci u dvadesetom vijeku doprinijeli su postavljanju temelja moderne kulturne renesanse putem novinarstva, romana i pozorišta.
sentences.translationEn: Arab intellectuals in the twentieth century contributed to laying the foundations of the modern cultural renaissance through journalism, the novel and theatre.
